---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see -->

## Problem Statement
<!-- Describe the problem this feature would solve -->

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe:
<!-- e.g., I'm always frustrated when... -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the solution you'd like -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered -->

## Use Case
<!-- Describe how this feature would be used -->

### User Story
<!-- Optional: Write a user story -->
As a [type of user], I want [goal] so that [benefit].

### Example Scenario
<!-- Provide a concrete example of how this feature would be used -->

1. User uploads a tax document
2. System processes the document
3. [Your feature enhancement here]
4. User receives improved results

## Benefits
<!-- What are the benefits of implementing this feature? -->

- [ ] Improves accuracy
- [ ] Enhances user experience
- [ ] Increases performance
- [ ] Adds new functionality
- [ ] Reduces manual work
- [ ] Other: [please specify]

## Technical Considerations
<!-- Optional: Any technical details or considerations -->

### Backend Changes
<!-- What backend changes would be needed? -->

- [ ] New API endpoints
- [ ] Database schema changes
- [ ] New ML models or algorithms
- [ ] External service integration
- [ ] Other: [please specify]

### Frontend Changes
<!-- What frontend changes would be needed? -->

- [ ] New UI components
- [ ] New pages or routes
- [ ] UI/UX improvements
- [ ] Data visualization
- [ ] Other: [please specify]

## Priority
<!-- How important is this feature to you? -->

- [ ] Critical - Blocks core functionality
- [ ] High - Significantly improves user experience
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor enhancement

## Mockups/Examples
<!-- Optional: Add mockups, wireframes, or examples from other applications -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here -->

## Implementation Suggestions
<!-- Optional: If you have ideas on how to implement this, share them here -->

## Related Issues
<!-- Link to related issues or feature requests -->

Related to #

## Checklist
<!-- Please check the following before submitting -->

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have clearly described the feature and its benefits
- [ ] I have considered alternative solutions
- [ ] I have provided use cases or examples
